title: Cursor Annualized Revenue Doubles to Over $2 Billion
description: Cursor’s annualized revenue topped $2 billion in February, according to a person familiar with the matter, a figure that underscores the wide popularity of the artificial intelligence coding assistant.

title: Musk Is on Trial Over His Tweets Ahead of Twitter Purchase
description: Elon Musk’s brief effort to back out of buying Twitter Inc. in 2022 is the focus of a trial that kicked off Monday over claims the world’s richest person manipulated the company’s stock price to get himself a better deal.

title: Why Big AI Is Obsessed With India
description: US tech giants like Open AI, Microsoft and Google are pouring billions of dollars into developing AI in India. But can the world’s most populous nation create its own sovereign AI champion?  (Source: Bloomberg)
